group_1.narration: ―Ao―@Thus we shall rule,@and be ruled by none.
―Shizuka―@We shall shepherd the masses,@as is our duty.
―Kanagi―@And we shall mete out punishment,@as is our right.
We hereby proclaim our rightful rule over Kamihama,@in the name of the Neo-Magius.

group_1.textRight: Well, we did it.

group_1.textLeft: Yes, we certainly did...

group_1.textRight: *Chuckle* I feel a little refreshed.

group_1.textLeft: Indeed...
Madam Princess.

group_1.textRight: Mm?

group_1.textLeft: What's our next move? What should we do?

group_1.textRight: Hehe, don't be in such a rush, Nagirin.
For now, it's "wait-and-see" time.
No more sneaking around behind the scenes.
I'm gonna plan for rolling our future out@in plain sight.

group_1.textLeft: Does that mean we'll be going head-to-head@with the other groups...?
I think it's a foregone conclusion as far as@inadequate preparation is concerned...

group_1.textRight: Mm~...@How should I put this?
In Hiko's opinion, now's the time to compete.
Rather than being told "oh yeah, that happened"@afterwards and finding out that they lost,
I wanna clash in real time and make them@FEEL the loss.
Just like, totally crush their hearts, y'know?
That's why I wanna duke it out as hard as we can@with the rest of the groups.
Make 'em feel despair from the bottom of their@souls so they won't even bother resisting.
Any objections?

group_1.textLeft: No, not in the slightest.
You're committed to Magical Girl supremacy,@even over your enemies, aren't you?

group_1.textRight: It's about time for us to head back to Takarazaki.

group_1.textLeft: Ah, right, I've been yapping away.

group_1.textRight: Thanks a bunch for seeing us off.

group_1.textLeft: Catch you guys later, then.@Bye-bye!

group_1.textRight: Of course.

group_1.textLeft: Farewell.
...What are you going to do if we successfully@demolish Kamihama?

group_1.textRight: ...Ah, right.
Probably fall into selfish despair and die.

group_1.textLeft: ...Fair enough, I guess.

group_1.textRight: Would you stop me?

group_1.textLeft: I don't know.
First of all, there's no guarantee that I won't@despair too...

group_1.textRight: That's true.
Everyone will disappear because of us.
What?

group_1.textLeft: You're nonchalant as ever, Yakumo.

group_1.textRight: Once you've sunk down this far, there's nothing@to be afraid of anymore.

group_1.textLeft: I suppose it's only natural to have shed@your doubts.

group_1.textRight: Well then, this is where we part ways.

group_1.textLeft: Hm, what for? Are you stopping by your@Coordinator shop?

group_1.textRight: Goodness no, I could never.@Mii might be there.
...[wait:1.0][chara:101701:lipSynch_1]I haven't gone home at all yet.

group_1.textLeft: ...![wait:1.0][chara:101601:cheek_0][chara:101601:face_mtn_ex_000.exp.json][chara:101601:lipSynch_1]@I guess that makes sense, though.
I take it you've got a temporary residence@around here?

group_1.textRight: That's right.
And you? Would you care to come with me,@Kanagi?

group_1.textLeft: I'll pass.

group_1.textRight: ...You still haven't cast aside your doubts, hm?

group_1.textLeft: Yeah. It seems that I haven't mustered the nerve@to take the plunge yet.
...Truly, that is what it comes down to...
...I'm going home to my family.

group_1.textRight: That's fine. See you tomorrow.
...[wait:1.0][chara:101701:cheek_0][chara:101701:face_mtn_ex_001.exp.json][chara:101701:lipSynch_1]You know, Kanagi...

group_1.textLeft: What?

group_1.textRight: We've been through a lot together, haven't we?
The East-West conflict, the Magius' project...

group_1.textLeft: We certainly have.

group_1.textRight: Now it's not only in this town―
We're facing Endless Mirrors, reaching across time@and space to all sorts of places.

group_1.textLeft: What are you trying to say?

group_1.textRight: ...My wish for destruction.
In fact, the more I resist, the more dangerous@it may be for me to try to overcome it.
If that's the case,
the future might be happier if I destroy Kamihama@to ensure that my wish is fulfilled.

group_1.textLeft: So that's why you're choosing to "ride the wave@of destruction", as you put it...
